evidence.audit_60_round_methodology: 60 methodology mới chưa triển khai: property-based (5) + differential vs spec (5) + cross-file consistency (5) + schema-vs-data (5) + R85 historical semantic (5) + numerical bounds (5) + encoding/locale stress (5) + adversarial/fuzz (5) + idempotent reproducibility (5) + transport/storage (5) + cross-CMD foundation (5) + meta-audit (5)
